candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Represents non-current assets total, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit balance-sheet total for current assets.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash flow beginning/end balances for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance agrees conceptually but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the balance-sheet year-end cash target.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Long-term liabilities total, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best match for short-term debt/current interest-bearing debt; separate lease liabilities are reported elsewhere, so this is the clean non-lease current debt total.
Represents only current maturities of long-term debt and may miss other short-term borrowings; use only if no cleaner current debt total exists.
Lease-related and should be excluded from baseline STD.

variables.notes: Chosen outside the STD shortlist because it is a cleaner reported total for current interest-bearing debt and lease liabilities are separately disclosed, helping avoid including leases or double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct tax payable/current tax liability line.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet match for property, plant and equipment; preferred over cash flow capex lines and intangible asset rows.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related tangible assets component, not total PPE; baseline PPE usually prefers the reported aggregate tangible assets line.
Separate ROU asset line, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Used the reported aggregate tangible assets line as PPE proxy.
Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: NET CASH FLOW FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES CASH FLOW FROM INVESTING ACTIVITIES Acquisitions of subsidiaries less cash and cash equivalents at acquisition time
candidates.why: This is the operating cash flow total line, though concatenated with following section text in the preview.

final_choice.row_label: NET CASH FLOW FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES CASH FLOW FROM INVESTING ACTIVITIES Acquisitions of subsidiaries less cash and cash equivalents at acquisition time

variables.notes: Despite the concatenated wording, this is clearly the net cash flow from operating activities line in the cash flow statement.
